content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
11. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
12. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM decision_table d
  WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'
), haus_counts AS (
  SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY HAUS
)
SELECT 
  b.HAUS,
  b.ANLAGE,
  b.ABLEINH,
  b.TOUR,
  b.ME_MA_ID,
  b.CITY1,
  b.CITY2,
  b.HOUSE_NUM1,
  b.POST_CODE1,
  b.EQUNR,
  CASE
    WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA'
    ELSE 'EVU'
  END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
  eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.",
  COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.TITLE END AS NET_TITLE,
  COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS NET_FORENAME,
  COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS NET_SURNAME,
  COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.STREET END AS NET_STREET,
  COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS NET_STREETNO,
  COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS NET_POST_CODE1,
  COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS NET_CITY1,
  COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2_MASTER,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS NET_CITY2,
  COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL,
  CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS NET_EMAIL,
  sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
  sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
  sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
  sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
  sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
  sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
  sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
  sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
  sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON b.HAUS = hc.HAUS
LEFT JOIN eablg ON b.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON b.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON b.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU'
WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
   OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
   OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999
   OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')
   OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');

UPDATE J09A_temp
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024'
  INTERSECT
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023'
);

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'

CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS WITH base AS (SELECT d.* FROM decision_table d WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'), haus_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM base GROUP BY HAUS) SELECT b.HAUS, b.ANLAGE, b.ABLEINH, b.TOUR, b.ME_MA_ID, b.CITY1, b.CITY2, b.HOUSE_NUM1, b.POST_CODE1, b.EQUNR, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1_MASTER, COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1_MASTER, COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2_MASTER, COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.TITLE END AS NET_TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS NET_FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS NET_SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.STREET END AS NET_STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS NET_STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS NET_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS NET_CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS NET_CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS NET_EMAIL, sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO, sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1, sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2, sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL FROM base b LEFT JOIN haus_counts hc ON b.HAUS = hc.HAUS LEFT JOIN eablg ON b.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON b.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON b.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld')

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_MASTER AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_MASTER AS CITY1, CITY2_MASTER AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_MASTER AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_MASTER AS CITY1, CITY2_MASTER AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.email: Please find attached the J09A mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09A meter reading entries excluding mandatory reading cases.

kwargs.content:
Process J09A completed.

- Created and processed temporary table for TOUR like `J09A%`
- Applied decision rules and mandatory reading override
- Exported:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 666 rows
  - `J09A.csv` with 20200 rows
- Sent:
  - mandatory file to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
  - remaining file to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary table `J09A_temp`
